svg.title: Retail data engineering pipeline architecture
svg.desc: Top-down flowchart showing data flow from DummyJSON API through Python ETL scripts, SQLite storage, SQL RFM analysis and EDA notebook, into a Power BI dashboard.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What data does the DummyJSON API provide?')
sendPrompt('What does transform.py do and why does it flatten nested JSON?')
sendPrompt('Why was SQLite chosen over a production database?')
sendPrompt('How does the NTILE(5) window function work in the RFM queries?')
sendPrompt('What charts are in the EDA notebook?')
sendPrompt('What visuals are in the Power BI dashboard?')
